summary: Bug in pBTC-on-BSC node software accepted older Bitcoin transaction proofs without enforcing finality, enabling replay of stale deposit broadcasts.
attack_trace: Replay an older valid Bitcoin pegout broadcast
Bridge nodes process the pegout as new
Mint pBTC against transaction already redeemed
root_cause: pNetwork node missed the input UTXO check for the pegout transaction, conflating new and replayed deposits.
